Best accessed by walking along this mowed path. The blackberries are mostly in the open grassy areas and under the sumac. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
All over the park, easily accessible from the walking paths, some denser areas if you are willing to walk a little bit into the brush. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.

Persimmon tree typically fully loaded. Hangs over drainage ditch so access can be difficult. Access: Public.
